name: Mickey Mouse
subtitle: Brave Little Tailor
flavorText: When defeat looms and victory hangs by a thread, a hero bolts to the rescue, patching things up with sheer determination.

name: Cinderella

abilities.rulesText: Whenever you play a song, this character may challenge ready characters this turn.

name: Bruno Madrigal

abilities.storyName: YOU JUST HAVE TO SEE IT
abilities.rulesText: {E} — Name a card, then reveal the top card of your deck. If it's the named card, put that card into your hand and gain 3 lore. Otherwise, put it on the top of your deck.

subtitle: Undetected Uncle
rulesText: YOU JUST HAVE TO SEE IT {E} – Name a card, then reveal the top card of your deck. If it’s the named card, put that card into your hand and gain 3 lore. Otherwise, put it on the top of your deck.

name: Vanellope Von Schweetz

abilities.rulesText: Whenever you play another Princess character, all opposing characters get -1 {S} until the start of your next turn.

name: Oswald

abilities.rulesText: During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may reveal the top card of your deck. If it's an item card, you may play that item for free and it enters play exerted. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of your deck.

subtitle: The Lucky Rabbit
rulesText: FAVORABLE CHANCE During your turn, whenever a card is put into your inkwell, you may reveal the top card of your deck. If it's an item card, you may play that item for free and they enter play exerted. Otherwise, put it on the bottom of your deck.
